channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Three Arguments Against Tariffs
item.description: It is not enough to lower tariff rates. Congress should make it so that no future president can play games with tariffs like Trump has.

item.title: Fair housing groups file lawsuit arguing a federal rule change removes protections for minorities
item.description: Fair housing organizations filed a lawsuit Wednesday over a federal rule change that they say would reverse decades of lending protections and open th...

item.title: Protecting Humanness from AI
item.description: It is instructive that Pope Leo’s first statement raises concerns about artificial intelligence.

item.title: MAID Gone Mad in Canada
item.description: Canada’s assisted suicide regime has gone down exactly the slippery slope conservatives predicted.
